compiled_state.title: Implement scaffold-adapter.sh and Flask/NextJS template files
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/scaffold-adapter.sh and the template files for Flask and NextJS route boilerplate.

### scaffold-adapter.sh:
1. Read RECIPE_NAME=scaffold-route, RECIPE_PARAM_FRAMEWORK (flask|nextjs), RECIPE_PARAM_ROUTE (e.g., "users"), RECIPE_PARAM_OUTPUT_DIR (target directory, default: src/).
2. Template directory resolution: RECIPE_TEMPLATES_DIR env var (for testing) or default to recipes/templates/{framework}/.
3. For each template in the framework directory: read template, substitute {{ROUTE_NAME}}, {{route_name}}, {{RouteName}} with the route name (snake_case, kebab-case, PascalCase variants). Write to output dir.
4. Idempotency: if output files already exist, skip (return files_changed=[], transforms_applied=0, exit_code=0). RECIPE_PARAM_OVERWRITE=1 forces overwrite.
5. Generative rollback: Track all files created. On failure, delete them. No git stash needed (RECIPE_TYPE=generative).
6. JSON output: {files_changed: [list], transforms_applied: N, errors: [], exit_code: 0, degraded: false, engine_name: "scaffold"}

### Template files to create:
recipes/templates/flask/:
  - route.py.tmpl: Flask blueprint with @blueprint.route decorator, view function, 200 JSON response
  - template.html.tmpl: Minimal Jinja2 template extending base.html

recipes/templates/nextjs/:
  - page.tsx.tmpl: NextJS page component (function + default export)
  - api-route.ts.tmpl: NextJS API route handler (export default function handler)

All templates use {{ROUTE_NAME}} placeholder substituted by adapter with snake_case route name. {{RouteName}} for PascalCase class names.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/scaffold-adapter.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/scaffold-adapter.sh
- [ ] Flask template files exist
  Verify: test -f recipes/templates/flask/route.py.tmpl && test -f recipes/templates/flask/template.html.tmpl
- [ ] NextJS template files exist
  Verify: test -f recipes/templates/nextjs/page.tsx.tmpl && test -f recipes/templates/nextjs/api-route.ts.tmpl
- [ ] All tests in test-scaffold-adapter.sh pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-scaffold-adapter.sh
- [ ] All tests in test-scaffold-templates.sh pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-scaffold-templates.sh
